design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Super vs ChatGPT|competitor_comparison|people comparing Super with ChatGPT|2026-07-06T10:55:17.355457+00:00') -> choice=comparison-lab. AIDA Check: Attention hero, Interest proof, Desire motion, Action CTA confirmed. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk. Hero Math Verification: clamp(44px–76px), max-width 1120px yields 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: compare-grid uses grid-auto-flow:dense. GSAP Motion Selection: card-stacking + hover-physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary black pill, secondary white pill, contrast verified.
headline: Super vs ChatGPT: personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats. Previous comparison-page failures omitted visible buyer-guide and decision-matrix language even when the article was useful; that must never happen. The visible page must include the exact phrases Buyer guide and Decision matrix.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, source‑backed comparison of Super and ChatGPT for people deciding between a general conversational assistant and a purpose‑built personal AI agent that can operate computers and reuse a computer‑use cache for repeated workflows.
